rationale: Educ. Code §21.704 governs local educator excellence innovation plans and agency approval. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraised values, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict.
quote: Sec. 21.704. LOCAL EDUCATOR EXCELLENCE INNOVATION PLANS.
_note: No textual or operational overlap between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this statute, which addresses school district grant plan submission and approval procedures.
